title: ego lite: I gave Claude Code & Codex a browser to run web automation — here's what happened
summary: ego lite is a Chromium-based browser that provides isolated workspaces for AI agents to perform web automation without interfering with the user's normal browsing. It integrates with AI coding tools like Claude Code, Codex, and Cursor, and features a code-based API, semantic page snapshots, and support for Chrome data migration.
